settings.title: Settings

language.title: Language
language.followSystemDesc: Automatically switch UI language based on system language

runtime.googleAIStudioCredentialStatusUnavailabl: Google AI Studio credential status unavailable.
runtime.googleAIStudioCredentialUpdateFailed: Google AI Studio credential update failed.
runtime.googleAIStudioCredentialClearFailed: Google AI Studio credential clear failed.
runtime.googleAIStudioApiKeyCleared: Google AI Studio API key cleared.
runtime.maxRecentModelsPositiveInteger: maxRecentModels must be a positive integer.

openrouter.title: OpenRouter
openrouter.explicitProviderDesc: OpenRouter is a first-class provider, but it is not an implicit fallback. Select OpenRouter Chat explicitly in Console before sending through OpenRouter.
openrouter.debugEchoDesc: DEV only, stream mode only. Helps diagnose provider parameter mapping.
openrouter.catalogCacheDesc: After clearing, the model picker needs to sync the model catalog again next time it opens.
openrouter.catalogCacheClearCurrent: Clear current API Key model cache
openrouter.catalogCacheClearCurrentConfirm: This will not delete the API Key or chat history. After clearing, the model picker needs to sync the model catalog again next time it opens. Clear the current API Key model cache?
openrouter.catalogCacheClearAllConfirm: This will not delete the API Key or chat history. After clearing, the model picker needs to sync the model catalog again next time it opens. Clear all OpenRouter model caches?
openrouter.catalogCacheClearCurrentSuccess: Current API Key model cache cleared.

openAIResponses.title: OpenAI Responses Experimental Chat
openAIResponses.desc: Native OpenAI Responses text-only path. It is separate from OpenRouter, default-off, and uses a main-process credential bridge.
openAIResponses.note: This only updates the experimental OpenAI Responses Console default. Use Console refresh for official availability diagnostics. It does not publish models to the main picker and does not enable chat by itself.

googleAIStudio.title: Google AI Studio Experimental Chat
googleAIStudio.desc: Native Gemini API text-only path. It is separate from OpenRouter, default-off, and uses a main-process credential bridge.
googleAIStudio.note: This only updates the experimental Google AI Studio Console default. Use Console refresh for official availability diagnostics. It does not publish models to the main picker, does not enable chat by itself, and does not use legacy Gemini runtime.

anthropic.title: Anthropic Messages Experimental Chat
anthropic.desc: Native Anthropic Messages text-only path. It is separate from OpenRouter, default-off, and uses a main-process credential bridge.
anthropic.note: This only updates the experimental Anthropic Messages Console default. Use Console refresh for official availability diagnostics. It does not publish models to the main picker, does not enable chat by itself, and does not persist thinking/signature output.

deepSeek.title: DeepSeek Official Experimental Chat
deepSeek.desc: Native DeepSeek official profile using DeepSeek API semantics. It is separate from OpenRouter, default-off, and uses a main-process credential bridge.
deepSeek.note: This only updates the experimental DeepSeek official Console default. Use Console refresh for official availability diagnostics. Deprecated aliases deepseek-chat and deepseek-reasoner are not long-term primary models. It does not publish models to the main picker, does not enable chat by itself, and does not persist reasoning_content.

localEndpoint.title: Local Endpoint Diagnostics
localEndpoint.desc: Experimental diagnostics only. Text chat requires the explicit LocalEndpoint console mode.
localEndpoint.noModelsFound: no models found; enter a manual model id below
localEndpoint.textCapabilitySummary: Capability summary: text diagnostics only; diagnostics do not activate chat send; tools/files/reasoning/web disabled.
localEndpoint.streamingCapabilitySummary: Capability summary: streaming diagnostics only; diagnostics do not activate chat send; tools/files/reasoning/web disabled.
localEndpoint.chooseProbedModel: Choose probed model for experimental chat
localEndpoint.manualModelForChat: Manual model id for experimental chat
localEndpoint.useEndpointAndModel: Use endpoint and model for experimental chat
localEndpoint.useManualEndpointAndModel: Use manual endpoint and model for experimental chat
localEndpoint.note: This only updates the experimental LocalEndpoint Console defaults. It does not publish models to the main picker and does not enable chat by itself.
localEndpoint.manualNote: Manual override is kept for servers that do not expose a model list. LocalEndpoint remains experimental and default-off.

lmStudio.title: LM Studio Local
lmStudio.experimentalLabel: LM Studio Local · native REST controls · loopback only
lmStudio.boundarySummary: Loopback-only text chat; native REST controls are separate from chat mode.
lmStudio.bridgeUnavailable: LM Studio provider bridge is unavailable.

ollama.title: Ollama Local
ollama.experimentalLabel: Ollama Local · native REST control plane · loopback only
ollama.boundarySummary: Loopback-only text chat; load/unload use the native control plane and never download models.

network.title: Network Experiments
network.proxyPolicyDesc: Plugin downloads use this policy. Automatic and conversion-time downloads remain disabled.
network.strictSslRequired: Strict SSL required for plugin downloads
network.currentModeProbeDesc: Current mode: {mode}. Probe checks metadata, HEAD and a 1 KB Range request only.
network.streamInMainDesc: Use IPC + electron.net for SSE (enables keepalive/force HTTP/1.1)
network.copyRunReportDesc: Copy a run report for A/B debugging.

reasoning.title: Global Reasoning Defaults
reasoning.hint: Defaults apply to non-project sessions. Session-level preferences override project/global defaults.
reasoning.inlineDefaultDesc: Controls whether new assistant inline reasoning opens expanded.
reasoning.userMessageRichDesc: Default for sessions in follow mode.
reasoning.recentModelsLimitDesc: Controls the Model Picker Rec list.

search.title: Global Web Search Defaults
search.hintDefault: Global mode=default inherits your OpenRouter account plugin default.
search.hintGlobal: Global defaults apply when project/session keeps mode=default.

settings.footer: ui-app reads OpenRouter settings from electron-store (not env) to avoid hidden overrides.
